applied.question: What is the purpose of the duplicate note-book system?
rationale: Stem opens with generic filler rather than a direct test prompt.
Stem appeals to vague authority language instead of naming a governing source.
One or more options contain formatting noise or corrupted punctuation.
Question text or options show corrupted wording, mojibake, or obvious spelling damage.
Keywords or tags appear to be derived from filler phrasing rather than the real concept.
